title: Indore, Madhya Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Indore, Madhya Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Indore is a city in Madhya Pradesh with a population of 3,200,000. The cleanest city in India and a major commercial center in central India, known for its street food, textile industry, and educational institutions.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
